description: Vital Recorder is open. Your goal is to capture a snapshot of a specific hemodynamic event in a surgical case. Using the case file 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\case_0018.vital', document the 30-minute mark (00:30:00) with a waveform display showing at least two physiological tracks (e.g., ART, ECG). Save the screenshot to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\case_snapshot.png'.
